narrative:
Norwood 4-C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,083 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
